zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Fiennes於1425年出生在英國素可時，她的父親Sir James Fiennes31歲，母親Joan31歲。她於1440年與Sir William Cromer在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1459年在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德享年34歲，埋葬在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Fiennes于1425年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Sir James Fiennes31岁，母亲Joan31岁。她于1440年与Sir William Cromer在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1459年在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德享年34岁，埋葬在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Fiennes was born in 1425, in Sussex, England, her father, Sir James Fiennes, was 31 and her mother, Joan, was 31. She married Sir William Cromer in 1440, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1459, in Chelmsford, Essex, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Chelmsford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Fiennes est née en 1425, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Fiennes, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Cromer en 1440, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1459, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Fiennes 1425 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Fiennes 31 und ihre Mutter Joan 31. Sie hat 1440 in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England Sir William Cromer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1459 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Chelmsford, Essex, England und wurde in Chelmsford, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Fiennes è nata il nel 1425 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir James Fiennes, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Joan, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Cromer nel 1440, nel Herstmonceux, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1459, nel Chelmsford, Essex, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Chelmsford, Essex, England.

ja.Upper Stoke, Kent, England: イギリスケントウップエル ストク
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fiennesが1425年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Sir James Fiennesは31歳，母Joanは31歳であった。1440年にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスでSir William Cromerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1459年にイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードで34歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fiennes(이)가 1425년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Fiennes(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1440년 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 Sir William Cromer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Fiennes nasceu em 1425, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James Fiennes, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Cromer em 1440, em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1459, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Fiennes родилась в 1425 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir James Fiennes было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Cromer в 1440 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1459 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Fiennes nació en 1425, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir James Fiennes, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir William Cromer en 1440, en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1459, en Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra.
